title: Utah
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Utah

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Utah

You can apply for Medicaid in Utah by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Utah

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Utah

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Utah

CHIP in Utah

Utah CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Utah CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Utah CHIP.
